    Method CreateUnchecked

    CreateUnchecked(in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4)

    Creates a new SparseWeight8 struct.

    Declaration
    public static SparseWeight8 CreateUnchecked(in Vector4 idx0123, in Vector4 idx4567, in Vector4 wgt0123, in Vector4 wgt4567)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Vector4 idx0123

    The first 4 indices.
    Vector4 idx4567

    The next 4 indices.
    Vector4 wgt0123

    The first 4 weights.
    Vector4 wgt4567

    The next 4 weights.
    Returns
    Type Description
    SparseWeight8

    A SparseWeight8 instance.
    Remarks

    Unlike Create(in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4, in Vector4), this method
    is a direct call to the constructor, so it's very fast. But it doesn't validate the input
    values, so it's intended to be used in limited scenarios, where performance is paramount.
